#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server](index.md 'index')

## Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events Namespace

| Classes | |
| :--- | :--- |
| [AggregateMetadata](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.AggregateMetadata.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.AggregateMetadata') | Metadata stored at the aggregate metadata key tracking the current event sequence\. |
| [DeadLetterMessage](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.DeadLetterMessage.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.DeadLetterMessage') | Dead\-letter message containing full command context, error details, and correlation context\. Published to per\-tenant dead\-letter topic when command processing fails due to infrastructure errors\. Rule \#13: No stack traces \-\- exception type \+ message only\. |
| [DeadLetterPublisher](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.DeadLetterPublisher.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.DeadLetterPublisher') | Publishes dead\-letter messages to per\-tenant dead\-letter topics via DAPR pub/sub\. Returns false for publication failures and propagates OperationCanceledException for cancellation\. No custom retry logic \-\- DAPR resiliency handles transient failures \(rule \#4\)\. SEC\-5: Never logs command payload or event payload data\. |
| [EventDeserializationException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventDeserializationException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventDeserializationException') | Thrown when an event cannot be deserialized from the state store, indicating corrupt data or schema issues\. |
| [EventEnvelope](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventEnvelope.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventEnvelope') | Storage representation of a persisted event in the actor state store\. Contains 11 metadata fields plus the serialized payload\. |
| [EventPersister](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventPersister.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventPersister') | Persists domain events to the actor state store using write\-once keys with gapless sequence numbers\. Created per\-actor\-call \(same pattern as IdempotencyChecker, EventStreamReader\)\. Does NOT call SaveStateAsync \-\- the caller \(AggregateActor\) commits atomically \(D1\)\. Storage key isolation \(FR15, FR28\): all keys are derived from AggregateIdentity which enforces tenant\-scoped composite keys\. Cross\-tenant access is structurally impossible because colons are forbidden in identity components, ensuring disjoint key spaces per tenant\. SECURITY: Never use DaprClient\.QueryStateAsync or bulk state queries without explicit tenant filtering\. DAPR query API does not enforce actor state scoping\. See FR28\. |
| [EventPersistResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventPersistResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventPersistResult') | Result of persisting events, containing the new sequence number and the persisted envelopes\. Story 4\.1: EventPublisher needs the persisted envelopes to publish them via pub/sub\. |
| [EventPublisher](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventPublisher.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventPublisher') | Publishes persisted events to DAPR pub/sub with CloudEvents 1\.0 metadata \(FR17\)\. Uses DaprClient\.PublishEventAsync which natively wraps data in CloudEvents format\. No custom retry logic \-\- DAPR resiliency policies handle transient failures \(rule \#4\)\. |
| [EventPublishResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventPublishResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventPublishResult') | Result of publishing events to pub/sub\. |
| [EventStreamReader](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventStreamReader.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.EventStreamReader') | Reads events from the actor state store and rehydrates aggregate state\. Supports snapshot\-aware rehydration: when a snapshot is provided, only tail events after the snapshot sequence are loaded \(Story 3\.10\)\. Created per\-call \(not DI\-registered\) \-\- same pattern as IdempotencyChecker and TenantValidator\. |
| [MissingEventException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.MissingEventException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.MissingEventException') | Thrown when an expected event is missing from the event stream, indicating data corruption\. |
| [NoOpEventPayloadProtectionService](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.NoOpEventPayloadProtectionService.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.NoOpEventPayloadProtectionService') | Default implementation that leaves payloads and snapshots unchanged\. |
| [RehydrationResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.RehydrationResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.RehydrationResult') | Result of aggregate state rehydration, separating snapshot state from tail events\. EventStore is schema\-ignorant: it cannot apply tail events to snapshot state\. Only the domain service knows its own state shape and can project events onto it\. |
| [SnapshotManager](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.SnapshotManager.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.SnapshotManager') | Manages aggregate state snapshots at configurable intervals\. Snapshot creation is advisory \-\- failures never block command processing \(rule \#12\)\. Does NOT call SaveStateAsync \-\- the caller commits atomically \(D1\)\. |
| [SnapshotRecord](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.SnapshotRecord.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.SnapshotRecord') | Immutable record representing a snapshot of aggregate state at a specific event sequence\. Stored via IActorStateManager at key `{tenant}:{domain}:{aggId}:snapshot`\. |
| [TopicNameValidator](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.TopicNameValidator.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.TopicNameValidator') | Validates pub/sub topic names per D6 convention \(\{tenant\}\.\{domain\}\.events\) and ensures compatibility with DAPR\-supported backends: Kafka \(249 chars\), RabbitMQ \(255 chars\), Azure Service Bus \(260 chars\)\. Defense\-in\-depth \-\- primary enforcement is via AggregateIdentity input validation \(NFR28\)\. |
| [UnknownEventException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.UnknownEventException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.UnknownEventException') | Thrown when an event type cannot be deserialized during state rehydration\. Domain services must maintain backward\-compatible deserialization for all event types\. |

Defense\-in\-depth layer \-\- primary enforcement is via AggregateIdentity input validation\. |
